datasets.label: NSD-Imagery public release
datasets.task_type: paired perception/imagery extension with NSD-style identifiers
datasets.status: already integrated; exhausted for the fixed primary benchmark
datasets.notes: Preserves benchmark semantics, but the currently accessible public release still yields only 5 shared paired ids on the fixed ladder.

datasets.label: Visual imagery and false memory for pictures
datasets.lane_fit: secondary benchmark and future paper path
datasets.primary_use: imagery / reality-monitoring benchmark distinct from the NSD-style ladder
datasets.notes: Genuine imagery task, but not a drop-in replacement for the natural-image paired threshold ladder.

datasets.label: Natural Object Dataset (NOD)
datasets.status: metadata mirror cloned on the live pod; annexed imaging content not yet acquired
datasets.notes: High subject count and image scale make it the strongest immediate public perception-only option for the practical lane. Metadata-only Git acquisition now exists at cache/public_datasets/ds004496 on the live pod.

datasets.label: THINGS-fMRI
datasets.classification: Animus robustness dataset and future object-semantic benchmark
datasets.lane_fit: practical Animus lane and future paper path
datasets.primary_use: object-rich perception benchmark with strong semantic structure
datasets.notes: Excellent object-semantic coverage and derivatives, but fewer subjects than NOD.

datasets.label: BOLD5000
datasets.primary_use: image-scale perception benchmark with COCO/ImageNet/SUN overlap
datasets.notes: Operationally attractive and historically important, but smaller and less subject-rich than NOD.

datasets.label: Covert consciousness under anesthesia
datasets.task_type: mental imagery under graded propofol sedation
datasets.lane_fit: future source-routing / internally generated state work
datasets.primary_use: consciousness and internally generated state decoding
datasets.notes: Very strong for future imagery/consciousness papers, but not a natural-image paired threshold benchmark.
